title: indexing item in array find functions.
body:
getting following error in the 4.200:

```
%Error: Internal Error: vtry.sv:6:41: ../V3LinkResolve.cpp:241: Illegal bit select; no signal/member being extracted from
    6 |  iq = bitq.find_first_index() with (item[1:0] == 2'b00);
      |                                         ^
                        ... See the manual and https://verilator.org for more assistance.

```

sample code:

```
module vrty;
bit[20:0] bitq[$];
int iq[$];

initial begin
	iq = bitq.find_first_index() with (item[1:0] == 2'b00);
end
endmodule
```

this code is compiling with xrun and vcs
